creator: dburr@POBoxes.com
text:
My secret spy satellite informs me that on 12-Jun-98, Dom Mitchell wrote:
> 
>>Number:         6934
>>Category:       ports
>>Synopsis:       New port of ucspi-tcp 0.80

This is just a note to you to let you know that I have received your
latest ucspi-tcp port (as well as your previous daemontools port).  I
apologize for not getting to them until now -- this has been a real hectic
week.  I've got lots of time this weekend to work on ports-related issues,
though.  Thanks for bearing with me.
---
